seoTitle: Clover Flat vs Club Terrace — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clover Flat and Club Terrace. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clover Flat vs Club Terrace: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clover Flat and Club Terrace.
heading: Clover Flat vs Club Terrace — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clover Flat, Victoria and Club Terrace, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Club Terrace has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Clover Flat (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clover Flat or Club Terrace safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clover Flat has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Club Terrace scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clover Flat scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Club Terrace scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clover Flat or Club Terrace?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Club Terrace has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
